checks.framing_1_enforcement_§6_3_2: PASS — first paragraph after §6.3.2 header leads with the literal sentence '注意一个语言陷阱：**不要说"recompute 更快"**——它不是。' followed by blockquote: 'Swap 在 latency 上更快，但代码复杂度、CPU 内存依赖、错误恢复都更复杂。Recompute 在 latency 上更慢，但是单代码路径、零 CPU 依赖、bit-deterministic。vLLM v1 用 100 ms 的延迟惩罚换来四类复杂度的消除。' Exact framing the tester required. NEVER says 'recompute is faster' anywhere in §6.3.

§6.5.4 '1 点 Pareto 前沿是模型的属性，不是 vLLM 的属性'

diagrams_decision: APPROVED without diagrams. Two team-lead candidates evaluated: (a) §6.3 trade-off matrix at lines 181-189 — 7-axis × 3-strategy ASCII matrix is clearer than a figure for that many cells side-by-side; (b) §6.5 Pareto frontier at lines 478-484 — 7-row sweep table with ★ Pareto markers + saturation column conveys the trade-off plane more precisely than a 2D scatter plot, AND §6.5.4 explicitly warns readers that '1 Pareto point is a model simplification artifact', which a real scatter would obscure. Neither candidate reads as confusing without a figure. Per Ch04/05 judgment criterion, no REJECT.
novel_strengths_vs_ch04_05_baselines: Ch04: 13 mapping rows / Ch05: 21 / Ch06: 29 + 11 mini-table rows. Larger and richer mapping than predecessors.
Two-tier mapping (§6.6 main + §6.3.5/§6.5.5 mini-tables) ties analytical models (PreemptionScenario, EngineConfig) to vLLM source on a per-section basis without overloading §6.6.
Tester framing guidance applied with surgical precision: §6.3.2 swap-faster (NOT recompute-faster), §6.4.1 K18-first, §6.5.3 16x as sweep-pair (P05).
Strong language-trap callouts (4 separate ones) prevent common reader misconceptions — interview-level rigor.
Honest framing in §6.5.4 ('1 Pareto point is a model artifact, not vLLM truth') — academic integrity move that prevents readers from over-fitting to the demo numbers.
Cross-chapter coherence: front-matter cites Ch04 §4.3.2 by section number; closing forward-links to Ch07 with 'substrate → ecosystem' framing that signals book architecture.
non_blocking_observations: Line 111 inline-density warning involves 3 single-symbol math fragments in a derivation paragraph — exactly the W06-allowed case. Promoting them to display blocks would break the prose flow.

§6.3.4 abort calculation in line 247: '100 步×5% 概率×5 秒 SLA penalty + base 164 ms ≈ 25,164 ms' — math is 100*0.05*5000ms = 25000ms + 164ms = 25164ms, correct. Correctly framed as 'abort 比 recompute 慢 25 倍' (25164/983 ≈ 25.6).
§6.4.4 aged_priority example correctly handles tier 3 (request_id) tie-break: C and D both have aged_priority=-6, but C.id < D.id so C ranks before D, yielding [B, A, C, D]. Math verified.
Front-matter line 9 has trailing Chinese parenthetical inside a backtick path ('注意：不是 preempt 路径') — cosmetic, doesn't break grounding.
v6_compliance_alignment: Ch06 matches or exceeds Ch04 + Ch05 baseline on all v6 metrics: lint clean, demo↔narrative fidelity verified, mapping table 29 rows (Ch04: 13, Ch05: 21), 60 # REFERENCE: comments, 5-step rhythm holds across §6.2-§6.5, scope discipline maintained (no Ch04 mechanics re-derivation). Confirms v6 cadence at N=3.
